types: Device information (device ID, OS, IP address, browser type)
Product usage data (which features used, time spent)
Camera and microphone data (for video conferencing features)

purposes: Provide and improve Creative Cloud services
purposes_of_collection.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — verify against live policy

cross_site_tracking.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Adobe uses cookies and pixel tracking

honors_dnt.source_quote: Based on training knowledge — Adobe historically does not honor Do Not Track

childrens_privacy.notes: Adobe requires users to be 13+ or the age of digital consent in their jurisdiction. Creative Cloud is primarily marketed to professionals but has student plans.

gaps: Specific data breach notification timeline not stated
Third-party count and exhaustive list not provided
label_notes: Source: training knowledge — accessed 2026-03-20. Adobe explicitly uses data to train generative AI models, including Firefly. Cloud content storage means uploaded files may be scanned for features and services. Generative AI use is significant privacy concern. Does not explicitly sell data but shares with advertisers.
